required_spec: straight-grained dry hardwood suitable for segmented bowl rings with stable glue joints
search_terms: hardwood strips maple walnut mahogany segmented drum shell
sourcing_risk: Wood species changes mass damping and structural behavior.

required_spec: 20.3 in plus wrap allowance hide or synthetic membrane suitable for plucked-string bridge load
search_terms: goatskin drum head rawhide calfskin synthetic drum head large
supplier_candidates: drum builders; percussion suppliers; leather supplier
substitution_policy: Synthetic acceptable for prototype if documented
sourcing_risk: Ethical sourcing and cultural presentation require review.

required_spec: rounded head-retention hardware or lacing that will not cut membrane
search_terms: brass upholstery tacks drum lacing cord rawhide lace stainless tacks
substitution_policy: Use lacing instead of tacks if rim splitting risk is high
sourcing_risk: Fasteners can split rim or tear head.

required_spec: 51.2 in straight-grained hardwood neck blank with no runout in load path
search_terms: hard maple neck blank 52 inch straight grain hardwood
substitution_policy: Do not substitute weak or short-grain stock
sourcing_risk: Neck failure under string load is a safety risk.

required_spec: rounded steel/brass tail anchor rated above total string load with no cutting edges
search_terms: brass ring steel tailpiece harp anchor ring 21 strings
substitution_policy: Substitute only if load-rated and deburred
sourcing_risk: Unrated jewelry or craft rings are not acceptable.

required_spec: dense stable hardwood blank for tall notched bridge with replaceable saddle surface
search_terms: ebony rosewood maple bridge blank luthier
substitution_policy: Use domestic dense hardwood if protected species risk exists
sourcing_risk: Protected wood sourcing can create legal and ethical risk.

required_spec: compressible but stable bridge foot pad material
search_terms: leather cork felt bridge pad sheet
supplier_candidates: craft leather supplier; music repair supplier
sourcing_risk: Pad changes tone and head pressure.

required_spec: two hardwood handles/posts sized for comfortable grip and structural installation
search_terms: hardwood dowel 1 inch turning blank handles
substitution_policy: Confirm ergonomics with mockup before buying finished parts
sourcing_risk: Handle holes can weaken top structure.

required_spec: nylon strings or monofilament gauges revised to safe percent-break targets
search_terms: harp nylon string gauges monofilament music string
supplier_candidates: harp string supplier; fishing-line supplier for test only
substitution_policy: Do not buy final gauges until tension redesign passes
sourcing_risk: Wrong gauges can break or overload structure.

required_spec: wound bass strings with known unit weight or manufacturer tension data
search_terms: wound harp strings custom bass strings unit weight
supplier_candidates: harp string supplier; custom string maker
substitution_policy: Require unit weight data or measured mass per length
sourcing_risk: Effective density factor is only a model.

required_spec: piezo pickup suitable for removable prototype mounting
search_terms: piezo pickup disk under bridge transducer film
supplier_candidates: CB Gitty; Cigar Box Nation suppliers; electronics supplier
substitution_policy: Optional; omit from acoustic prototype if risk is high
sourcing_risk: Pickup placement can damp head and invite premature drilling.

required_spec: laser-safe plywood or acrylic for slot/alignment templates
sourcing_risk: Kerf and humidity can affect string spacing.
